description.zh-cn: 营销风控反作弊：维护 IP/邮箱/手机号黑名单，监测同 IP 高频注册、命中黑名单等风险并记录风险事件(含等级与命中规则)，可设置同 IP 注册频率阈值自动标记高风险，后台审阅事件与黑白名单管理。
description.en: Risk control / anti-fraud: maintain IP/email/phone blacklists, detect high-frequency registrations per IP and blacklist hits, log risk events (level + matched rule) with a configurable per-IP registration threshold, and review events plus manage the blacklist in admin.
